words.def: larceny of property having a value less than some amount (the amount varies by locale)
words.zh: a. 瑣碎的, 小規模的, 小氣的, 委瑣的

words.def: a subdivision of a particular kind of thing
words.zh: n. 型別, 樣式, 典型, 榜樣, 標誌, 符號, 型, 式
adv. 還, 尚, 仍然, 已經, 然而

words.def: a domesticated animal kept for companionship or amusement
words.zh: n. 寵物, 受寵愛的人, 寵壞的孩子, 不悅, 生氣
